generated_by: hand transcription by a human reader working from rendered page images
purpose: Ground truth for the REAL external PDFs in testdata/external_raw/. These files are the publishers' own bytes, downloaded unmodified. Nothing here was drawn by scripts/make_testdata.py, so the geometry is not ours.
ordering_discipline: Every value below was read off a 140-dpi PNG render of the page (and, for four pages of ext_les/ext_utep that carry no field data, off the raw pdfplumber text layer) and written into this file BEFORE core.extract.extract_document was called even once in this session. The extractor's field output had not been observed at the time this file was saved. See the report for the audit trail.

field_semantics.expected: the value a careful human reads off the page for this field
field_semantics.expect_absent: the page carries NO readable value for this field. The only acceptable outcomes are abstain or field-not-returned. Any concrete value here is a WRONG value -- a false positive -- and is counted as such.
field_semantics.note: why this call was made, where it was not obvious

documents.what_it_is: ADP 'Earnings Statement' sample check + stub, published by the California Courts. Filled with sample data.
documents.note: Rate/Hours are COLUMN HEADERS over a two-row earnings matrix (Regular 14.9000/40.00, Overtime 22.3500/5.00). The regular row is the nearest row below each header. Period Beginning/Ending/Pay Date each appear TWICE (statement header and check stub at the foot) with identical values, so a duplicate hit is harmless here.

documents.what_it_is: PeopleSoft payroll advice, UNC Chapel Hill published sample. Dense 2-column ruled layout.
documents.note: TRAP, flagged before running anything: the page carries a labelled field 'Pay Rate: $45,000.00 Annual'. 'PAY RATE' is in LABEL_MAP as hourly_rate, but the value is an ANNUAL SALARY. The true hourly rate (20.346846) is unlabelled, in the Rate column of the earnings matrix. Also: the 'Employee Name' box is redacted in this sample -- it holds an address (123 Franklin St / CHAPEL HILL, NC 27517), no name -- so person_name must abstain. TOTAL GROSS row has Current 1,627.74 and YTD 28,707.21 side by side.

documents.what_it_is: Ascendium/UTEP 'Understanding Your Pay Stub' handout. Page 1 holds a sample stub; pages 2-3 are glossary prose.
documents.note: TRAP, flagged before running anything: the 'Pay Rate' COLUMN IS EMPTY on this sample -- every cell under it is blank. hourly_rate must abstain. The cells physically below the 'Pay Rate' header belong to the Description column's rows (Overtime/Regular/Vacation/Bonus) and the numbers nearby (0, 74.25, 5.50) live under 'Current Hours'. Page 2 is a glossary containing the strings 'Gross Earnings/Gross Wages' and 'Net Income/Net Pay' followed by PROSE definitions.

documents.what_it_is: Federal Earnings & Leave Statement guide. Pages 1-2 are a GLOSSARY table (Data Element Name | Description); page 3 holds the actual filled LES; pages 4-5 are leave detail and prose.
documents.note: TRAP, flagged before running anything: pages 1-2 are a glossary whose LEFT column is literally our label vocabulary -- 'Net Pay', 'Pay Date', 'Name', 'Hourly Rate', 'For Pay Period Ending', 'Pay Begin Date' -- and whose RIGHT column is an English sentence, not a value. extract_document merges pages with found.setdefault, so PAGE 1 WINS any field it can fill. The real values are on page 3. Whether this document reads correctly depends entirely on the type-parse guard rejecting prose. pay_period_start comes from 'Pay Begin Date 7/22/2010' in the Basic Information block (single-digit month as printed).

documents.what_it_is: NY DOL form T402B, Unemployment Insurance Monetary Benefit Determination. A BLANK unfilled form.
documents.note: Every value slot is empty. 'Date Mailed:' is followed by the fill-in rule ' / / '. 'Weekly Benefit Rate:' has an empty box, and is weekly rather than monthly in any case. The whole document is a false-positive test: there is no correct non-abstain answer to any field.

documents.what_it_is: VA Form 26-8497 / USDA 410-5, Request for Verification of Employment. A BLANK unfilled form.
documents.note: Blank form. Item 2 (name of applicant), item 5 (date), item 12 (current base pay) and item 15 (average hours worked each week) are all empty boxes. Bare '$' glyphs sit in many of the money boxes with no digits after them. Like the NY form, this is purely a false-positive test.

downloads.note: sha256 of the publishers' bytes exactly as received. The files were not re-rendered, re-typeset, re-keyed or edited in any way. Anyone re-downloading from the source_url above can confirm these hashes.

not_obtained.reason: HTTP 403 from the CDN on every attempt, including with browser User-Agent and a consumerfinance.gov Referer. Body is an Akamai 'Access Denied' page (reference #18.d93a6f3d.1784448933.2ba67f54), not a PDF. No substitute was invented for it.
